mapper.select: SELECT * FROM COUNSEL_INFO ORDER BY counsel_date DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NEXTVAL(seq_counsel)
INSERT INTO COUNSEL_INFO (seq_counsel, counsel_title, counsel_content, counsel_writer) VALUES (#{seq_counsel}, #{counsel_title}, #{counsel_content}, #{counsel_writer})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM COUNSEL_COMMENT WHERE seq_counsel = #{seq_counsel} ORDER BY comment_date ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NEXTVAL(seq_counsel_comment)
INSERT INTO COUNSEL_COMMENT (seq_comment, seq_counsel, comment_content, comment_writer) VALUES (#{seq_comment}, #{seq_counsel}, #{comment_content}, #{comment_writer})
mapper.update: UPDATE COUNSEL_INFO SET counsel_content = REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE(counsel_content, '건성', '*****'), '찌질', '*****'), '말투', '*****'), '뻔뻔', '*****'), '싸가지', '*****') WHERE counsel_content LIKE '%건성%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%찌질%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%말투%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%뻔뻔%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%싸가지%'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COUNSEL_INFO WHERE counsel_date <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)
